name: @metorial/heap
description: Track custom events, manage user identities, and enrich analytics data server-side. Send individual or bulk custom events with properties, attach user-level and account-level properties, identify and merge user profiles across sessions and devices, delete users for privacy compliance (GDPR/CCPA), and sync user segment membership to external systems via webhooks. Supports event-based webhooks and periodic segment sync callbacks for data export.
